title: Prepare sports turf surfaces for play
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare sports turf surfaces for play demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan and prepare the site for sports surface preparation activities

pcs.text: Establish sports surface set-up plan and work activity according to sport rules and specifications
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish sports surface set-up plan and work activity according to sport rules and specifications?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish sports surface set-up plan and work activity according to sport rules and specifications.

pcs.text: Identify and manage permanent and temporary obstacles according to sport set-up procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and manage permanent and temporary obstacles according to sport set-up procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and manage permanent and temporary obstacles according to sport set-up procedures.

pcs.text: Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and implement controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and implement controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify workplace health, safety and environmental hazards, assess risks and implement controls.

pcs.text: Identify and select equipment and resources for setting up the sport surface according to the sport's rules and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and select equipment and resources for setting up the sport surface according to the sport's rules and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and select equipment and resources for setting up the sport surface according to the sport's rules and regulations.

pcs.text: Check and adjust profile moisture condition according to sport rules, regulations and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check and adjust profile moisture condition according to sport rules, regulations and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check and adjust profile moisture condition according to sport rules, regulations and workplace procedures.
